title: Form Interaction Demo
description: Fill a form, submit it, and verify the result

steps.title: Introduce the form
steps.narration: Let's see how to fill and submit a contact form in the application.

steps.title: Fill message field
steps.text: Hello, I would like to learn more about your product.

steps.title: Explain what we did
steps.narration: We filled in the name, email and message fields. Now let's submit the form.

steps.title: Show result
steps.narration: The form has been submitted successfully. A confirmation message is displayed.
